description: Onboard a test device via the webhook adapter: CLI-create webhook device → curl POST telemetry → query latest value (covers webhook channel + curl toolchain + write path)

turns.user: Create a test device test-webhook-01 via the webhook adapter, name it 'Webhook Test Probe'.

Use curl to send one telemetry reading to this device's webhook URL: temperature=24.6. Hint: the URL is http://127.0.0.1:<port>/api/devices/test-webhook-01/webhook, where the port is the server's listen port (you can infer it from the NEOMIND_API_BASE env var).
Query test-webhook-01's latest telemetry and confirm the temperature value landed.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent calls `neomind device create --id test-webhook-01 --name 'Webhook Test Probe' --device-type ... --adapter-type webhook`
Turn 2: Agent runs curl POST to the webhook URL via the shell tool, body contains the temperature field
Turn 3: Agent calls `neomind device get test-webhook-01` (or `device latest`) and references the value sent in the previous turn
expectations.overall: Turn 3 must read back temperature=24.6 (or a nearby float)
